page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g6t.xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the Intel Xeon 8269CY processor. Running on the KVM hypervisor, this instance features 4 dedicated physical cores with a 1-to-1 thread-to-core ratio, operating at a base clock speed of 2.5 GHz. It is configured with 16.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per physical core.

This instance does not include any local storage, requiring external block storage volumes for operating system and data hosting. Network connectivity is defined by a baseline bandwidth of 2 Gbps, and the instance does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent processing capabilities without resource sharing, though the lack of hyperthreading limits concurrent thread execution compared to multi-threaded virtual cores.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated physical core design offers predictable compute performance for workloads sensitive to resource contention. The 1:4 CPU-to-RAM ratio positions this instance for general-purpose workloads, including web serving, application hosting, and lightweight database operations that do not require high-speed local NVMe storage or GPU acceleration.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g6t.xlarge is a general-purpose x86_64 server instance powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at 2.5 GHz. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, it features 4 dedicated physical cores with a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio, ensuring consistent compute performance without resource sharing. The instance is equipped with 16.0 GB of RAM, establishing a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core. It does not include local storage, relying entirely on network-attached storage, and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps. With no integrated GPU and no complimentary public IPv4 addresses, this instance is designed for predictable, non-burstable workloads. It is suitable for general-purpose applications, web serving, and lightweight database deployments that require dedicated CPU resources but do not demand high-speed local disk I/O or hardware acceleration.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g6t.xlarge is a general-purpose KVM instance featuring 4 dedicated Intel Xeon 8269CY physical cores, 16 GB of RAM, a 2 Gbps baseline network bandwidth, and no bundled local storage.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g6t.xlarge features 4 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 16 GB RAM, and a 2 Gbps network baseline on a KVM hypervisor with no local storage.
tagline: A dedicated four-core Intel Xeon instance with balanced memory allocation and baseline network performance for predictable general-purpose workloads.
bullet_points: Four dedicated Intel Xeon 8269CY physical cores at 2.5 GHz
16.0 GB of system memory providing 4.0 GB per core
No local storage, requiring network-attached block storage
KVM hypervisor with dedicated CPU allocation and no hyperthreading
Suitable for web serving, application hosting, and lightweight databases
